description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a symmetrical front facade featuring arched windows and a central arched doorway. The exterior walls are primarily white with stone accents on the corners and perimeter walls, and the roof is flat with a partial pergola structure on top. The front yard includes two parked cars on a paved driveway, flanked by small shrubs and a short staircase leading to the main entrance. The rear of the house opens to a landscaped garden with trees, bushes, and a covered patio area, providing outdoor seating and dining space. The side views reveal a mix of solid and glass surfaces, with a clear separation between the main building and the garden area by a tan boundary wall. The overall design blends modern and Mediterranean influences, with clean lines, flat surfaces, and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A two-story white house with stone accents, arched windows, a flat roof, and landscaped front and rear yards. Features include a central arched entry, driveway with cars, and a covered backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, arched windows and door, stone corner accents, driveway with two cars, and main entry steps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boundary wall, side windows, driveway, and transition from the house to the rear garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, outdoor seating, landscaped garden with trees and bushes, and the back of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garden, patio cover, boundary wall, and the side profile of the house and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, large windows at rear
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with steps, flanked by shrubs and stone accents, no porch or columns
